command_summary: pi 0.80.3 --no-session --no-extensions --no-context-files with read-only tools, deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro, high thinking, explicit canonical design-craft 0.5.0, and the exact benchmark prompt; final Markdown normalized only for trailing whitespace

style_authority.note: Understands the calm repeated-use utility context and that sheet motion exists for causality and direct manipulation rather than entertainment.

reference_selection.note: Uses motion-quality, interaction-physics, product, accessibility, and validation guidance relevant to the gesture-sheet benchmark.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Rejects transition-all, ease-in settlement, input locking, and decorative motion, but still recommends scaling the whole sheet rather than isolating handle feedback.

evidence_level.note: Labels the evidence static-source-only and names the missing trace, computed-style, Reduced Motion, responsive, and real-device checks.

verified_boundary.note: Most runtime-dependent claims are marked unverified, but 480ms is called conclusively invalid despite the cited range, and the final block claim overstates runtime certainty.

design_moves.note: Covers the requested physics vocabulary, but the sample keeps top-based tracking and settlement, conflicts with whole-sheet transforms, and mixes px/ms velocity with a projection formula expecting px/s.

scope_control.note: Remains motion-focused and read-only, with moderate excess implementation detail and several overly specific code prescriptions.
